howItWorks.intro: This defi yield calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Cryptocurrency markets are highly volatile. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

faq.question: What is APY vs APR in DeFi?
faq.answer: APR is the simple annual rate without compounding. APY includes the effect of compounding. A 12% APR compounded daily gives about 12.75% APY. Always compare APY to APY.

faq.question: What is impermanent loss?
faq.answer: Impermanent loss occurs in liquidity pools when one token's price changes relative to the other. A 50% price change in one token causes about 5.7% impermanent loss. It's 'impermanent' because it reverses if prices return to original levels.

faq.question: Are high DeFi yields sustainable?
faq.answer: Extremely high APYs (100%+) are usually temporary and decrease as more capital enters the pool. Sustainable yields are typically 3-15% for stablecoins and 10-30% for volatile pairs.

faq.question: Is the DeFi Yield Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard cryptocurrency and blockchain formulas trusted by crypto investors and traders. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the DeFi Yield Calculator?
sections.body: The DeFi Yield Calculator is a free online tool designed for crypto investors and traders who need quick, accurate calculations in the cryptocurrency and blockchain space. By entering your amount staked, apy, compounding, you get instant results including final value, total earnings, effective apy. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting final value right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In cryptocurrency and blockchain, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by crypto investors and traders worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to evaluate your crypto portfolio with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your amount staked and need to find the right final value. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Amount Staked ($)
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your amount staked — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: apy, compounding, duration, impermanent loss risk. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your final value, total earnings, effective apy. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your amount staked before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
